records.ety: [L. transitorius: cf. F. transitoire. See Transient.]

defs: Continuing only for a short time; not enduring; fleeting; evanescent.
quotes: Comfort and succor all those who, in this transitory life, are in trouble.
It was not the transitory light of a comet, which shines and glows for a wile, and then . . . vanishes into nothing.
